auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licenced Public Accountants Kenora
one_time_description: Contingent settlement of Flood Claim with Canada and Ontario approved July 2022, expected combined settlement of $88.4 million (not yet recorded in financial statements)
economic_notes: Paagitoon Limited Partnership (janitorial services, 99.9% owned, GBE). Impact Benefit Agreement with New Gold Inc. for metal production payments (min $125,000/yr), royalty payments (min $125,000/yr), and annual education payment of $50,000. Mining revenue of $1,296,974 in 2022. Cafe operations generating $94,603. Commitment to rehabilitate access road estimated at $5.7 million total cost.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Licenced Public Accountants' based in Kenora, Ontario. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Naotkamegwanning Education Authority, Naotkamegwanning Health and Social Services, Shawendaasowin Child and Family Services. One GBE: Paagitoon Limited Partnership (janitorial services). Large contingent asset of $88.4 million flood claim settlement approved July 2022 but not recorded in these statements. CMHC housing mortgages cover 56 units across 6 loans. Net debt position of $3,388,132. Trust funds held by ISC under Indian Act not included in financial statements. COVID-19 uncertainty note included. Annual debt service represents net change in long-term debt (repayments net of new borrowings).
